## 检查清单 | Checklist
<!-- 在提交 PR 之前，请确保完成以下检查 | Before submitting, ensure you've completed the following -->

### 代码质量 | Code Quality
- [ ] 代码遵循项目风格指南 | Code follows project style guide
- [ ] 添加了必要的类型注解 | Added necessary type annotations
- [ ] 添加了清晰的文档字符串 | Added clear docstrings
- [ ] 代码通过了 linting 检查 | Code passes linting checks

### 测试 | Testing
- [ ] 添加了新功能的测试 | Added tests for new features
- [ ] 所有测试通过 | All tests pass
- [ ] 测试覆盖了边界情况 | Tests cover edge cases
- [ ] 手动测试了变更 | Manually tested the changes

### 文档 | Documentation
- [ ] 更新了 README（如需要）| Updated README (if needed)
- [ ] 更新了 SKILL.md（如需要）| Updated SKILL.md (if needed)
- [ ] 添加了代码注释（如需要）| Added code comments (if needed)
- [ ] 更新了相关文档 | Updated relevant documentation

### 提交 | Commits
- [ ] 提交信息清晰明确 | Commit messages are clear
- [ ] 遵循约定式提交规范 | Follows Conventional Commits
- [ ] 提交历史整洁 | Commit history is clean

### 其他 | Other
- [ ] 已阅读贡献指南 | Read CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] PR 标题清晰描述变更 | PR title clearly describes the change
- [ ] 已自我审查代码 | Self-reviewed the code
- [ ] 已解决所有 TODO 和 FIXME | Resolved all TODOs and FIXMEs
